title: AuditLogEvent
description: A single audit log event recording an action in the enterprise.

id.description: The unique identifier of the audit log event.

timestamp.description: The time when the action was performed.

action.description: The type of action that was performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted).

actor.description: The user or system that performed the action.

type.description: The type of actor (user, system, anonymous).

userId.description: The ID of the user who performed the action.

email.description: The email of the user who performed the action.

name.description: The display name of the actor.

modelId.description: The ID of the model (base, table, field, etc.) that was affected by the action.

modelType.description: The type of model affected (e.g., base, table, field, record, view).

category.description: The category of the event (e.g., app, user, share, enterprise).

baseId.description: The ID of the base where the event occurred.

tableId.description: The ID of the table where the event occurred.

viewId.description: The ID of the view involved in the event.

workspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace where the event occurred.

interfaceId.description: The ID of the interface involved in the event.

actionId.description: The ID of the specific action taken.

ipAddress.description: The IP address from which the action was performed.

payloadVersion.description: The version of the event payload format.
